channel.title: Journal of Group Theory
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Group Theory

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2025-frontmatter1

item.title: On normal subgroups in automorphism groups
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0089

item.title: Homeomorphism types of the Bowditch boundaries of infinite-ended relatively hyperbolic groups
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0264

item.title: Reflection length at infinity in hyperbolic reflection groups
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0073

item.title: Relative homology of arithmetic subgroups of SU(3)
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0140

item.title: Separability properties of nilpotent ℚ[𝑥]-powered groups II
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0288

item.title: Twisted conjugacy in residually finite groups of finite Prüfer rank
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0083

item.title: The commuting graph of a solvable 𝐴-group
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0076

item.title: On Gluck’s conjecture for wreath product type groups
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2024-0042

item.title: Root cycles in Coxeter groups
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2023-0027

item.title: The binary actions of simple groups with a single conjugacy class of involutions
item.description: Article by Nick Gill, Pierre Guillot DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jgth-2024-0066
